patch.value: GH-598: pm init .gitignore block hardcodes .agents/pm/ prefix — custom-root workspaces commit runtime cache and conflict on every merge

ensurePmGitignore renders the resolved tracker root (from --pm-path/PM_PATH/custom root) instead of the hardcoded .agents/pm/ prefix; custom-root init leaves runtime caches untracked; GH-514 fenced-block idempotency preserved; regression test covers custom-root init

GH-598. ensurePmGitignore (GH-514/pm-hous lineage) writes the managed runtime/cache ignore block with the tracker root hardcoded to .agents/pm/ instead of the resolved root. Workspaces using --pm-path/PM_PATH/custom roots commit runtime caches → guaranteed index churn and merge conflicts for multi-agent branches. Fix: render the resolved root into the fenced block, keep idempotency; regression test for custom-root init.
